goal: Preserve legacy catalog display types, align collection detail navigation order with collection grouping, and unify battle card asset paths/audio with the shared asset helpers without changing mainline entry behavior.
constraints: Do not delete card assets or historical card files; preserve existing source-of-truth in content/cards.
Keep runtime/gameplay card consumption on active cards only.
Preserve the existing App entry behavior, including the optional newFlow branch, while fixing audio path/runtime initialization drift.
deliverables: Legacy cards keep their original user-facing type labels such as 事件 and 反制 in generated catalog data.
Collection grid and detail navigation use the same active-card order.
Battle hand card images and bell audio use shared asset helpers instead of ad-hoc asset strings.
App audio initialization/path handling is unified without removing the current newFlow entry gate.
